issues.description: Action type should be 'TrashFromBoard' or similar (trashing this Character from board during Activate), not 'TrashFromHand'. The card is trashed as a cost of activation, not from hand.
Filter 'excludeSelf:true' is incorrect. The effect must trash THIS Character (self) as the activation cost. Should target self explicitly or use appropriate cost mechanism.
Target scope incomplete. Must filter by type '{Land of Wano}' and specify 'Leader or Character'. Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' does not enforce type restriction.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Text says 'during this turn' which should map to 'DuringYourTurn', not EndOfTurn.
